macro.title: Iran war could prompt Federal Reserve to raise rates, Pimco says - Financial Times
macro.summary: Bond giant and Franklin Templeton warn in interviews with FT against cuts in borrowing costs

macro.title: ‘This is the way’: Elon Musk endorses Warren Buffett’s famed 5-minute plan to fix the national debt - Fortune
macro.summary: The richest man in the world joins prominent financial leaders in supporting a plan to lower the deficit to 3% of GDP.

macro.title: A $730,000 Portfolio That Pays More Than What Most Americans Earn at Work - 24/7 Wall St.
macro.summary: The U.S. median wage for full-time, year-round workers sits near $51,000 a year. A portfolio of $730,000 can clear that bar, but only if the yield is set deliberately. The math is unforgiving in both directions: too conservative and the portfolio falls short,…

macro.title: Diet Coke parties are all the rage in India as aluminum can shortage bubbles up - NBC News
macro.summary: Love of Diet Coke runs deep for Ishika Gupta, but it was the fear of losing her favorite drink that took the obsession to new heights

macro.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says Gen Z and millennials are using ChatGPT like a 'life advisor'—but college students might be one step ahead - Fortune
macro.summary: OpenAI CEO said college students have built complex ChatGPT workflows and "don't really make life decisions without asking ChatGPT what they should do."
